message:
fix: race conditions in rate limiter, resource pool, blocking pool, circuit breaker, and rwlock

- Replace dual-CAS token bucket with mutex to eliminate refill/consume
  TOCTOU race where concurrent try_acquire could consume tokens between
  last_refill CAS and tokens_fixed CAS; process_queue now grants
  multiple waiting entries per tick to prevent starvation
- Add RAII CreateSlotReservation to GenericPoolState to track in-flight
  resource creation against max_size, preventing concurrent acquire()
  calls from overshooting the pool capacity limit; warmup() now clamps
  to remaining capacity
- Reject tasks spawned after blocking pool shutdown instead of silently
  enqueueing work that no thread will ever drain, which left callers
  hanging on wait_timeout() forever
- Fire on_state_change callback for Open->HalfOpen circuit breaker
  transition (was only firing for Closed->Open and HalfOpen->Closed),
  and update metrics.current_state during the transition
- Add fast-path check in OwnedWriteFuture::drop() to skip O(N) writer
  queue scan when waiter was already dequeued

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
